description_long: This is a rectangular, modern cabinet with a predominantly black and white color scheme. The cabinet features two large open compartments on one side, likely intended for storage or display, and a solid top surface suitable for placing objects. The sides are solid, with one side entirely black and the other white, creating a striking visual contrast. The interior appears to be hollow, with visible shelving or partitioning inside. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible handles or decorative elements, making it suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular black and white cabinet with two open compartments and a solid top, featuring a minimalist design.
description_view_0: The top and front of the cabinet are visible, showing two large open compartments and a solid, flat top surface.
description_view_1: The left side of the cabinet is visible, showing a solid black panel with no openings or features.
description_view_2: The back and right side are visible, with a solid white panel and partial view of the open compartments.
description_view_3: The right side is visible, showing a solid white panel and a glimpse into the interior through the open compartments.
